error: The launcher looked for calibration_rows_read and final_test_rows_read under locks, while the accepted D034 config stores them under authority.
improvement: Read the counters from the authority block and retain an explicit pre-payload zero-read record before the single corrected development attempt.
retry_rule: One corrected launcher attempt is permitted because the failure occurred before source-bound data loading; no model, threshold, split, seed, or scientific rule changes.
